rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code homestead exemption amount is unrelated to Educ. Code §29.0164, which governs special education due process hearing timelines. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The commissioner or agency may not adopt or enforce a rule that establishes a shorter period for filing a due process complaint alleging a violation of state or federal special education laws and requesting an impartial due process hearing than the maximum timeline designated under 20 U.S.C. Sections 1415(b)(6) and (f)(3).
_note: Rule text concerns special education due process timelines; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
